kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '46', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "robot", "password": "robot1234"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries status=401, reason=Unauthorized headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '12', 'ETag': 'W/"c-dAuDFQrdjS3hezqxDTNgW7AOlYk"', 'Date': 'Mon, 20 Apr 2026 18:19:50 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=Unauthorized
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo1LCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InJvYm90IiwiZW1haWwiOiJyb2JvdEBleGFtcGxlLmNvbSIsInVzZXJfbGV2ZWwiOiJyZWd1bGFyIiwiaWF0IjoxNzc2NzA5MTg3LCJleHAiOjE3NzY3OTU1ODd9.tN-oaeYPdnHdme7Y-UaK48H6sJJY5cuTeyAYgF8ncag'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '200', 'ETag': 'W/"c8-n9T8EXeHYGgIOTjUielgiULRwMo"', 'Date': 'Mon, 20 Apr 2026 18:19:52 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"entry_id":7,"user_id":5,"entry_date":"2025-06-14T21:00:00.000Z","mood":"Hyvä","weight":"75.00","sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Automaattitesti - Robot Framework","created_at":"2026-04-12T10:57:17.000Z"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo1LCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InJvYm90IiwiZW1haWwiOiJyb2JvdEBleGFtcGxlLmNvbSIsInVzZXJfbGV2ZWwiOiJyZWd1bGFyIiwiaWF0IjoxNzc2NzA5MTg3LCJleHAiOjE3NzY3OTU1ODd9.tN-oaeYPdnHdme7Y-UaK48H6sJJY5cuTeyAYgF8ncag', 'Content-Length': '119', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"entry_date": "2025-06-15", "mood": "Hyv\\u00e4", "weight": 75, "sleep_hours": 8, "notes": "Robot Framework API testi"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries/8 path_url=/api/entries/8 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo1LCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InJvYm90IiwiZW1haWwiOiJyb2JvdEBleGFtcGxlLmNvbSIsInVzZXJfbGV2ZWwiOiJyZWd1bGFyIiwiaWF0IjoxNzc2NzA5MTg3LCJleHAiOjE3NzY3OTU1ODd9.tN-oaeYPdnHdme7Y-UaK48H6sJJY5cuTeyAYgF8ncag', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
